name: SHINMEI RYU KESSEN OUGI: SHIN RAIKOUKEN (VOICE OF HEAVEN STYLE ABSOLUTE FIGHTING SKILL: TRUE LIGHTNING SLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 4

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: F, Mob

One of the most destructive techniques of the Shinmei Ryu style, it combines various techniques with advanced Chakra Control to imbue your weapon with excessive amounts of energy. The next attack you make with the weapon is greatly enhanced, striking with extreme velocity and unleashing a burst of power. The attack will gain Kawarimi Defense 3. Whether the attack hits or misses, a burst of energy is unleashed, dealing 4d8 electric and 4d8 force damage to all creatures and unattended objects in a 40 ft radius sphere around you, which does not affect you.

A Reflex save can be made to halve each type of damage. If the target was hit by the first melee strike, it receives a -4 penalty to those saves.
